caption: A group of men are gathered in an indoor setting, with a central figure wearing a white scarf over a grey jacket. He is smiling and looking toward several men standing beside him, including one in a dark suit and another in a brown jacket. The background is a plain white wall. Red news banners span the top and bottom of the screen. The top banner reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and includes the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo and website "news18india.com". The bottom red banner features the text "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है", along with a timestamp of "10:01 PM" and a smaller logo for "MAHARODH". As the scene progresses, a new text overlay appears in the upper left area of the lower frames, stating "2024 में JDU". The people remain in the same positions, maintaining their interactions.
